purpose: Implementation-agent contracts for the W601 frontier lab. These contracts convert each research-backed experiment into concrete backend interfaces, owner files, smoke fixtures, rollout phases, evidence gates, and verification commands.

implementation_research.lesson: MLIR dialect conversion formalizes legal targets, rewrite patterns, type converters, and partial/full conversion modes; KolmIR should use this as the mental model for declaring target legality and blocked lowering.

TVM Relax represents graph optimization and cross-level transformation across Relax and TensorIR; Kolm should separate behavior-level artifact planning from target-level operator lowering and scheduling.
IREE is an MLIR-based compiler/runtime that scales from datacenter to mobile and edge; Kolm's runtime target matrix should distinguish compile target, runtime driver, and deployment package.

ONNX Runtime GenAI owns tokenization, generation loop, logits processing, search, sampling, KV cache, chat templates, and structured output; Kolm runtime adapters need to model generation-loop capability, not only model-file format.
MLC LLM combines machine-learning compilation with native deployment APIs; Kolm should expose a portable backend contract that can choose compiler-accelerated runtimes without changing product UX.
Dynamo KV routing uses worker cache events and direct routing to maximize KV reuse; Kolm serving plans should represent cache locality and worker selection as first-class runtime policy.
Dynamo's KV offloading model separates runtime, logical block management, and transport tiers; Kolm long-context memory contracts should specify GPU, CPU, disk, and transport behavior.

KServe standardizes scalable multi-framework generative and predictive serving on Kubernetes with OpenAI-compatible inference and request-based autoscaling; Kolm cloud deploys need a Kubernetes-native contract.

Ray Serve LLM packages distributed multi-node, multi-model serving with OpenAI compatibility, monitoring, fault tolerance, and observability; Kolm should support Ray as a cloud/runtime target for large customer deployments.
Ray Serve autoscaling uses deployment replica policies and provider node scaling; Kolm compute plans should separate model-serving autoscaling signals from ordinary web autoscaling.
OpenAI Evals is a framework and benchmark registry for evaluating LLMs and LLM systems; Kolm benchmark governors should ship reproducible eval definitions rather than unstructured benchmark notes.
Inspect provides composable evaluation tasks, scorers, model adapters, and logs for safety and capability testing; Kolm security and compliance evals should be exportable to a neutral eval runner.

contract_rules: Every W601 experiment must have exactly one W603 implementation contract.
Every contract must name existing owner files, proposed files, entrypoints, schemas, smoke fixtures, rollout phases, evidence gates, failure modes, and verification commands.
Every contract is a local implementation contract only; external adoption, package publication, public benchmark data, and live certification remain separate evidence gates.
Every contract must be filterable by category, experiment, source, and metric so future implementation agents can take a narrow work order without losing global coverage.
Every contract must improve at least five tracked metrics and include at least one proof or safety gate.

contracts.title: Implement KV Memory Controller

entrypoints.name: planKvMemoryPolicy(input)
entrypoints.input_contract: task_type, prompt_tokens, retrieval_density, device_memory_gb, runtime_target, privacy_mode
entrypoints.output_contract: policy_id, cache_tiers, retained_span_rules, estimated_prefill_ms, estimated_decode_ms, evidence_level

entrypoints.name: explainKvMemoryReceipt(policy)
entrypoints.input_contract: policy plan plus eval result hashes
entrypoints.output_contract: signed receipt fragment with retained spans, evicted spans, cache tiers, and unsupported features

failure_modes: receipt cannot explain retained or evicted spans

contracts.title: Implement Context Extension Compiler

entrypoints.name: planContextExtension(input)
entrypoints.input_contract: base_model, current_context, requested_context, topology, budget, target_runtime
entrypoints.output_contract: strategy exact_distributed|sparse_prefill|positional_tune, blockers, cloud_plan, regression_tests

entrypoints.name: recordContextExtensionManifest(plan)
entrypoints.input_contract: plan plus tokenizer and positional metadata
entrypoints.output_contract: manifest patch containing tokenizer hash, rope/interpolation parameters, topology, and regression thresholds

failure_modes: manifest omits tokenizer or position metadata

contracts.title: Implement Structured Decode Contracts

entrypoints.name: compileDecodeContract(schema)
entrypoints.input_contract: json_schema, regex, ebnf, tool_schema, target_runtime
entrypoints.output_contract: native_constraint, validator, repair_policy, unsupported_reason

entrypoints.name: testDecodeContract(contract)
entrypoints.input_contract: contract plus adversarial samples
entrypoints.output_contract: syntax_pass_rate, semantic_pass_rate, repair_count, violation_examples

failure_modes: valid JSON has wrong semantic shape
runtime claims grammar support but ignores constraint
agent tool call escapes allowed schema

contracts.title: Implement Data Curation Engine

entrypoints.name: scoreDatasetRows(rows)
entrypoints.input_contract: capture rows with source, label, redaction, duplicate, and eval metadata
entrypoints.output_contract: row scores for quality, novelty, risk, uncertainty, and expected K-score lift

entrypoints.name: promoteTrainingRows(plan)
entrypoints.input_contract: ranked rows plus budget and privacy policy
entrypoints.output_contract: training split, holdout split, excluded rows, promotion receipt

failure_modes: dedupe removes rare but important examples

contracts.title: Implement MoE Serving Orchestrator

entrypoints.name: planMoeServingTopology(model, workload)
entrypoints.input_contract: expert_count, active_experts, gpu_count, latency_target, budget, runtime_preference
entrypoints.output_contract: runtime, expert_parallel_size, placement, load_balance_policy, autoscale_policy

entrypoints.name: scoreMoeServingEvidence(run)
entrypoints.input_contract: latency, throughput, expert utilization, queue depth, cache stats
entrypoints.output_contract: pass/fail evidence with imbalance and fallback recommendation

failure_modes: generic GPU plan ignores expert placement
autoscaling signal is ordinary CPU utilization

contracts.title: Implement Multimodal Edge Packager

entrypoints.name: planEdgeBundle(target)
entrypoints.input_contract: os, device, accelerator, modalities, model_family, storage_budget
entrypoints.output_contract: runtime_target, package_kind, fallback, capability_warnings

entrypoints.name: emitEdgePackageManifest(plan)
entrypoints.input_contract: edge bundle plan plus artifact hashes
entrypoints.output_contract: mobile/browser package manifest with runtime, model, permissions, and fallback mode

failure_modes: runtime support claimed without device probe
package not published but copy says install live

contracts.title: Implement Confidential Compute Runbook

entrypoints.name: planConfidentialJob(input)
entrypoints.input_contract: provider, workload, secret_refs, dataset_refs, tee_target, gpu_required
entrypoints.output_contract: attestation_target, key_policy_template, unsupported_controls, advisory_checks

entrypoints.name: verifyConfidentialEvidence(evidence)
entrypoints.input_contract: measurements, provider quote, key policy hash, firmware advisory status
entrypoints.output_contract: verified bool, missing evidence, claim_scope

failure_modes: attestation not bound to workload image
known firmware advisory status is unknown

contracts.title: Implement Runtime Target Matrix

entrypoints.name: getRuntimeTargetMatrix()
entrypoints.input_contract: none or optional target filter
entrypoints.output_contract: target rows with supported features, evidence status, package status, and caveats

entrypoints.name: selectRuntimeTarget(requirements)
entrypoints.input_contract: modalities, structured_output, context, privacy, device, budget
entrypoints.output_contract: target, unsupported_features, fallback, evidence_status

failure_modes: public claim not generated from matrix

contracts.title: Implement Benchmark Governor

entrypoints.name: classifyClaimEvidence(claim)
entrypoints.input_contract: claim text, metric, source file, evidence refs
entrypoints.output_contract: evidence_class, missing_proof, max_public_scope

entrypoints.name: runBenchmarkGovernor(plan)
entrypoints.input_contract: benchmark config, model ids, hardware, dataset card, confidence target
entrypoints.output_contract: reproducer manifest, confidence interval, red-team result, claim scope

failure_modes: synthetic evidence used as public claim

entrypoints.name: scorePrivacyUtilityTradeoff(rows)
entrypoints.input_contract: raw/redacted rows, redaction classes, DP budget, task type
entrypoints.output_contract: privacy risk, utility score, excluded rows, recommended mode

entrypoints.name: emitPrivacyUtilityReceipt(result)
entrypoints.input_contract: tradeoff result plus benchmark fixture ids
entrypoints.output_contract: audit receipt with redaction recall, utility delta, and policy blockers

contracts.title: Implement Cloud Train Autopilot

entrypoints.name: planTrainAutopilot(input)
entrypoints.input_contract: task, rows, holdout, local_gpu, privacy, budget, deadline, provider prefs
entrypoints.output_contract: recommendation, no-train option, provider plan, storage plan, secret refs, import plan

entrypoints.name: emitRemoteJobManifest(plan)
entrypoints.input_contract: autopilot recommendation, provider target, storage plan, webhook policy, and secret references
entrypoints.output_contract: secret-safe job manifest with logs, webhooks, artifact import, and failure diagnostics

failure_modes: remote result cannot be imported into compile/verify

entrypoints.name: appendReceiptEdge(edge)
entrypoints.input_contract: stage, input_hashes, output_hashes, actor, runtime, evidence refs
entrypoints.output_contract: edge hash, chain hash, signed envelope

entrypoints.name: verifyReceiptChain(chain)
entrypoints.input_contract: receipt chain without hosted service dependency
entrypoints.output_contract: valid bool, first broken edge, missing evidence, claim scope

contracts.title: Implement Package Adoption Rail

entrypoints.name: buildPackageAdoptionRail()
entrypoints.input_contract: package targets, registry evidence, signatures, adopter packets
entrypoints.output_contract: channel statuses, blockers, public copy scope, next external action

entrypoints.name: validatePackageClaim(surface)
entrypoints.input_contract: public claim or install command
entrypoints.output_contract: allowed bool, current gate, required evidence

failure_modes: install command appears before registry URL
external adoption claimed from local test

contracts.title: Implement Codegraph Test Miner

entrypoints.name: mineSurfaceOwnership(graph)
entrypoints.input_contract: product graph plus route, CLI, TUI, docs, and tests indexes
entrypoints.output_contract: surface owners, missing tests, claim sources, readiness links

entrypoints.name: emitImplementationWorkOrders(mined)
entrypoints.input_contract: mined ownership graph
entrypoints.output_contract: deterministic work orders with local command, evidence gate, and owner files

failure_modes: claim source points to stale copy
generated work order lacks local verification command

contracts.title: Implement Quantization Memory Joint Planner

entrypoints.name: planQuantMemoryJoint(input)
entrypoints.input_contract: model size, target runtime, context tokens, calibration rows, device memory, quality floor
entrypoints.output_contract: weight precision, activation precision, KV policy, recovery method, feasibility, fallback

entrypoints.name: scoreQuantMemoryCandidate(candidate)
entrypoints.input_contract: candidate plus holdout and runtime support
entrypoints.output_contract: quality, latency, memory, cost, portability, proof score

failure_modes: planner fits weights but not KV cache
target runtime lacks chosen numeric format
